top_signals.title: UAE Oil Exports Surged to 85% of Pre-War Levels, IEA Says - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: UAE Oil Exports Surged to 85% of Pre-War Levels, IEA Says  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stock Rout Pauses as Traders Await Micron Earnings: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A measure of calm returned to stock markets after a selloff in top-performing technology names, with Micron Technology Inc.’s earnings taking on added significance as a test for this year’s artificial intelligence-driven rally.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Germany set to scrap plans to build its biggest warship since second world war
top_signals.summary: Berlin wants to ditch F126 frigate programme after cost overruns and delays
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Airbus A380 Aircraft Require Checks for Possible Wing Cracks
top_signals.summary: The European Union Aviation Safety Agency is asking some operators of Airbus SE A380 jets to perform additional special inspections on their aircraft’s wings after identifying possible cracks in the structure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Luup scooters introduces automatic stop function to avoid nuisance use in Kyoto
top_signals.summary: Luup scooters, a favored transportation source for tourists in Japan, will automatically halt when nearing prohibited areas in Kyoto.
